chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-1911 of 2020 Riaz Ahmed Versus Auditor General of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case. Dated: 12.05.2025 None for the petitioner. Mr. Altaf Hussain for respondents. -.-.- This is an old case of 2020, which is over five years old. It was last taken up on 17.08.2023. On the said date none was present for the petitioner without intimation, which is almost two years ago. In the last two years learned counsel for the petitioner has failed to pursue this petition diligently. Today despite lapse of two years once again none is present for the petitioner without intimation. It appears that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this old petition which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Head of Const. Benches Judge
